evals.prompt: Which stories cover the catalog area?

assertions.text: us001 checklist shows [x] for all criteria (status=done)
us001 validation line says 'Validated: 3/3 criteria met (status=done).'
us001 match score is at least 5 (tag-weight hit)
Output excludes stories with no catalog tag (us002 approver-flow, us003 tracking, us013, us014)
Coverage summary mentions catalog and at least 1 matched story
us013 checklist shows [ ] for all criteria (status=draft, unverified)
us013 validation line says 'Unverified: 0/3 criteria checked (status=draft).'
Output excludes unrelated stories (us001, us002, us003, us014)
Output renders all stories with [[requestor-flow]] tag: us001, us003, us013, us014
Output excludes us002 (approver-flow tag, not requestor-flow)
Each matched story has the requestor-flow tag listed in its Tags: line
Match scores are at least 5 for each (tag exact hit)
Coverage summary lists status breakdown across the matched stories
